productDisplayName: Indian Terrain Men Navy Blue Trousers
description: Style NoteNothing matters whether it is a Monday morning or a Friday afternoon when it comes to comfort taking the front seat. These trousers from indian terrain make all your worries diminish as you glide in and out of work. Inspired by American sportswear, your appearance will always be one to contend with, so go ahead and create your own niche with comfort.Product DetailsNavy blue trousers that have a flat front, comfortable waistband with loops, two insert pockets on either sides, two double welt pockets with buttoned closures at the back, brand badge above the back pocket on the right with a buttoned and zipped closure on the frontMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine wash with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wring Tumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitLow rise; slim straightThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
